response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT consulting, architectural design with UML, German language proficiency (only basic), and explicit team management at executive level — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across multiple languages and environments (DLang, TypeScript, Linux)
Strong track record of mentoring and creating technical workshops/courses
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not C1 as required
No clear evidence of UML expertise or IT architecture design for client consulting
Lacks documented experience leading teams in an IT consulting context or managing client projects
